product_overview: A personal portfolio site for Abelion (Ihsanuddin Salav) built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind v4 and Supabase that showcases projects, achievements, dynamic hero status, an AI chat companion (Cybill) and a public guestbook backed by Supabase.
core_goals: Present a clear personal brand and portfolio for Abelion (Student. Builder. Learner.)
Showcase projects with GitHub integration and manual fallback data
Display verifiable achievements in a filterable masonry grid with lightbox and Verify action
Drive community interaction via a public guestbook backed by Supabase and an AI companion (Cybill)
Surface realtime / dynamic site state (Open to collaborate, Currently learning, Now playing) from Supabase and ListenBrainz
Provide lightweight, graceful error handling and data fallbacks (GitHub → manual, AI provider chain → static)

features.name: Dynamic Hero Status
features.description: Hero section on the homepage that shows live 'Open to collaborate' status and 'Currently learning' text fetched from Supabase settings, plus CTAs and social links.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe the Hero section -> Observe 'Open to collaborate' badge fetched from Supabase -> Observe 'Currently learning: [X]' text fetched from Supabase -> Click 'See my work' CTA -> Navigate to /projects

Navigate to / -> Observe the Hero section -> Supabase settings fetch fails -> See default 'Open to collaborate' fallback badge and default 'Currently learning: —' text -> Click 'View achievements' CTA -> Navigate to /achievements

features.name: Filterable Achievements (Masonry + Lightbox)
features.description: Achievements page with a responsive masonry grid, filter pills (All / Certificate / Participation), featured items, lightbox preview, and a 'Verify' action for entries with credential URLs.
user_flows: Navigate to /achievements -> Observe filter pills (All, Certificate, Participation) -> Click filter pill 'Certificate' -> View certificate images in masonry layout -> Click achievement card thumbnail -> See lightbox with full image -> Click 'Verify' button -> Open credential URL in new tab

Navigate to /achievements -> Click filter pill 'Certificate' -> Click achievement card that has no credentialUrl -> See disabled 'Verify' button or 'Verify not available' indicator -> Click image -> Lightbox fails to load image -> See image error placeholder and close lightbox

features.name: Projects (GitHub + Manual Fallback)
features.description: Projects page pulling pinned/live repositories from GitHub via lib/github.ts with hourly revalidation, plus a manual data/projects.ts fallback for offline or API-failure scenarios; cards show status, tech badges and links.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> See pinned projects and project grid (GitHub data) -> Click project card 'OlivX' -> See project detail or expanded card -> Click 'GitHub' link -> Open repository in new tab

Navigate to /projects -> GitHub API request fails -> See fallback projects from data/projects.ts displayed as placeholders -> Click project card with no liveUrl -> Observe 'Live not available' state and disabled Live button

features.name: Digital Guestbook + Cybill AI (RAG)
features.description: Public guestbook where visitors leave messages stored in Supabase. Guestbook triggers Cybill AI RAG replies using the AI fallback chain (OpenRouter → Gemini → Groq → static fallback). Realtime updates via Supabase Realtime and optional OAuth for authenticated posts.
user_flows: Navigate to /guestbook -> (Optional) Sign in with GitHub or Google via OAuth -> Fill name field -> Fill message field -> Click Sign Guestbook button -> See message appearing in the list (realtime) -> Wait for Cybill AI auto-reply -> See cybill_reply appended to the message

Navigate to /guestbook -> Fill name field with empty message -> Click Sign Guestbook button -> See validation error indicating message is required -> Correct message -> Click Sign Guestbook button -> See submission succeed
Navigate to /guestbook -> Submit message -> Supabase insert fails (network/db error) -> See error toast and message not added -> Retry submission after service recovery

features.name: AI Chatbot (Cybill Chat Interface)
features.description: Standalone chat interface at /chat that lets visitors interact with Cybill (Claude 3.5 Sonnet / configured chain). Messages support markdown rendering, chat clearing and an AI provider fallback chain for reliability.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Type message in chat input -> Click send button -> Receive AI response with markdown rendered in the chat -> Click Clear chat history -> See chat cleared

Navigate to /chat -> Type message in chat input -> Click send button -> AI provider error occurs (OpenRouter rate limit or error) -> Fallback provider responds or static fallback 'anjay cybill lagi overload bentar 😴 coba refresh nanti ya fr' appears -> See error banner with retry option

features.name: Now Playing (ListenBrainz Widget)
features.description: Small 'Now playing' widget shown in the hero or footer that queries ListenBrainz public endpoints and shows current track or hides when no track is playing.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe Now playing widget showing current track and artist pulled from ListenBrainz -> Click track or artist -> Open ListenBrainz track or user page in new tab
Navigate to / -> No current playing track detected from ListenBrainz -> Widget is hidden and no placeholder is shown

features.name: Supabase Settings (Admin via Table Editor)
features.description: Site content behavior (open_to_work, currently_learning, now_playing, maintenance_mode) is controlled through Supabase Table Editor rows so non-technical admins can update the site without code changes.
user_flows: Open Supabase Table Editor -> Open settings table row id=1 -> Edit open_to_work from true to false -> Save row -> Visit / -> Observe Hero badge updated to 'Currently busy' or equivalent

Open Supabase Table Editor -> Attempt to save settings without correct service role key or network connectivity -> Save fails -> Visit / -> Observe previous settings still in effect and see admin error in Supabase dashboard

features.name: Dynamic Hero Status
features.description: Displays "Open to Work" status and "Currently Learning" from Supabase.
user_interactions: Observe the Hero section for dynamic badges

features.name: AI Chatbot
features.description: Interactive chat with Abelion AI using Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

features.name: Digital Guestbook
features.description: Users can leave messages stored in Supabase.
user_interactions: See message appearing in the list

features.name: Filterable Achievements
features.description: Masonry grid of certificates with category filters.
user_interactions: View certificate images in masonry layout
